failures.description: The catalog search dependency timed out, so the agent could not retrieve the product evidence needed to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle.
failures.checklist_reasoning: At index 3, the agent attempted the required ProductCatalogSearch tool call with well-formed arguments. The tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: "catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms" with type "CatalogServiceTimeoutError" and infra metadata for the catalog service. This is not a malformed invocation, access block, or reasoning error. The later steps only report that the task could not be completed and do not resolve the timeout.
